mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.app_token, a.name, a.description, a.api_key, a.created_by, a.created_time, a.updated_by, a.updated_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bitable_table t WHERE t.app_token = a.app_token AND t.del_flag = '0') AS tableCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bitable_record r WHERE r.app_token = a.app_token AND r.del_flag = '0') AS recordCount FROM bitable_app a WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.del_flag = '0'

SELECT a.id, a.app_token, a.name, a.description, a.api_key, a.created_by, a.created_time, a.updated_by, a.updated_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bitable_table t WHERE t.app_token = a.app_token AND t.del_flag = '0') AS tableCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bitable_record r WHERE r.app_token = a.app_token AND r.del_flag = '0') AS recordCount FROM bitable_app a WHERE a.app_token = #{appToken} AND a.del_flag = '0'

SELECT a.id, a.app_token, a.name, a.description, a.api_key, a.created_by, a.created_time, a.updated_by, a.updated_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bitable_table t WHERE t.app_token = a.app_token AND t.del_flag = '0') AS tableCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bitable_record r WHERE r.app_token = a.app_token AND r.del_flag = '0') AS recordCount FROM bitable_app a WHERE a.del_flag = '0'
AND a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND a.app_token = #{appToken}
ORDER BY a.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bitable_app (app_token, name, description, api_key, created_by, created_time) VALUES (#{appToken}, #{name}, #{description}, #{apiKey}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE bitable_app SET del_flag = '1' WHERE id = #{id}
